rationale: The proposed change to Tax Code §11.13(b) homestead exemption is entirely unrelated to Fam. Code §264.4031, which governs multidisciplinary team working protocols for children's advocacy centers. No overlap in subject matter.
quote: A center shall adopt a multidisciplinary team working protocol.
_note: Rule text concerns child advocacy center protocols; proposed change concerns property tax homestead exemption. No intersection.
